caption: A person holds up a baseball card featuring a player and the name "ECKERSLEY," which is numbered "4/5" and contains an autograph. The card is held against a backdrop that includes a logo for "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM" and a surface decorated with orange and teal palm tree graphics. In a small inset window, a man wearing a navy blue t-shirt is visible, sitting in a chair behind a desk with computer equipment. As the sequence progresses, the hand moves the baseball card away from the camera, shifting the focus to the surrounding environment. The card is placed onto a white tiered stand. Throughout the footage, the "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM" logo remains visible in the upper right area, while the man in the inset window remains seated, looking toward the camera.
